title: Emerging from the Shadows: Rediscovering the Legacies of Weinberg & Korngold
original_title: Emerging from the Shadows: Rediscovering the Legacies of Weinberg & Korngold
overview: How do artists keep creating even in the darkest of times? How did the life-altering events of World War II shape our musical landscape up to today? This documentary uncovers the poignant stories of Mieczyslaw Weinberg and Erich Wolfgang Korngold: Two 20th-century composers of profound artistry, whose legacy is only recently being rediscovered after having been overshadowed in the aftermath of the Holocaust.
